mapper.insert:
insert into shopping_cart (name, image, user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, create_time, warehouse_id) values
(#{sc.name}, #{sc.image}, #{sc.userId}, #{sc.dishId}, #{sc.setmealId}, #{sc.dishFlavor}, #{sc.number}, #{sc.amount}, #{sc.createTime}, #{sc.warehouseId})
